landing.tagline: Share your Day Ticket, save money
landing.subtitle: For Durham University students
landing.feature1Desc: Upload your Day Ticket when you're done using it and help fellow students
landing.feature2Desc: Borrow tickets for just 5 points instead of paying £1.60
landing.feature3Desc: Verified Durham students only with reputation-based trust system

agreement.title: Terms of Service
agreement.section1Content: BusPool only provides information sharing services to match users' ticket resource sharing. The platform itself does not sell tickets, verify tickets, or guarantee ticket validity. All transactions occur between users, and the platform is not a party to the transaction.
agreement.section2Item1: The platform makes no guarantees regarding the authenticity or validity of uploaded tickets.
agreement.section2Item2: When users use others' tickets, if refused or penalised by the bus company, the responsibility lies with the user.
agreement.section2Item3: The platform is not liable for any losses resulting from invalid tickets (including but not limited to inability to ride, fines, etc.).
agreement.section2Item4: Users understand and agree that sharing others' Day Tickets may violate bus company terms, and all consequences are borne by the user.
agreement.section3Item1: Uploaders guarantee that uploaded tickets were legally purchased by them on the current day and are genuine and valid.
agreement.section3Item2: Borrowers understand that tickets come from third parties and there is a risk they may not work.
agreement.section3Item3: Users must not use the platform for fraud, point farming, or other violations.
agreement.section3Item4: Barcode photos are visible during the borrowing period. Borrowers must not screenshot or forward to third parties (violation results in account ban).
agreement.section4Item1: Points are for in-platform use only and cannot be exchanged for cash.
agreement.section4Item2: The platform reserves the right to adjust point rules with prior notice.
agreement.section4Item3: Abnormal point transactions (e.g., point farming) will be frozen and reviewed.
agreement.section5Item2: Reputation below 30 will restrict upload functionality.
agreement.section5Item3: Serious violations (e.g., repeated fake ticket uploads) will result in permanent account ban.

notifications.title: Notifications
